announcements.title: Notice
announcements.item1: The 12th World Tung On Convention will be held in Singapore in the second half of 2026. Stay tuned for details.
announcements.item2: 2026 membership registration and renewal is now open. All members are encouraged to register.
announcements.item3: Library hours adjusted: open Wed, Sat & Sun from 10am to 5pm.

about.defaultContent: Founded in 1876, Tung On Wui Kun is one of the oldest Chinese clan associations in Singapore. Established by immigrants from Dongguan and Bao'an counties in Guangdong, China, we are dedicated to fostering kinship, mutual aid, and cultural heritage.
about.story: For over a century, Tung On Wui Kun has upheld the mission of strengthening communal bonds, promoting Chinese culture, and serving the community — providing a social platform for fellow clansmen and contributing to the preservation of Chinese heritage overseas.
about.storyP1: Founded in 1876, Tung On Wui Kun is one of the oldest Chinese clan associations in Singapore.
about.storyP2: For over a century, Tung On Wui Kun has upheld the mission of strengthening communal bonds, promoting Chinese culture, and serving the community — providing a social platform for fellow clansmen and contributing to the preservation of Chinese heritage overseas.
about.storyP3: Tung On Wui Kun is not only the spiritual home of Dongguan and Bao'an clansmen, but also an important part of Singapore's Chinese clan association community. We are committed to uniting clansmen, promoting exchange, preserving culture, and serving society.
about.valuesSubtitle: Inheriting a century of spirit, uniting kinship
about.value4Desc: Serving and giving back to society

about.milestone1943: Established the Cantonese Opera Group to preserve opera culture

about.milestone2003: Founded the Singapore Dongguan Chamber of Commerce to promote trade between Singapore and Dongguan

news.title: Latest News
news.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest news and events from Tung On Wui Kun
news.article1Excerpt: The 2026 Spring Banquet was successfully held this month, with over 300 clansmen attending to share kinship and look forward to the new year.
news.article2Title: Cantonese Opera CNY Performance Receives Warm Response
news.article2Excerpt: The TOWK Cantonese Opera Group presented wonderful performances at Chinatown Cultural Square during Chinese New Year, drawing large audiences.
news.article3Title: Youth Group Dongguan Exchange Visit Completed
news.article3Excerpt: A group of 20 from the Youth Group visited their ancestral homeland in Dongguan for cultural exchange, deepening their understanding of hometown development.

history.title: Our Heritage
history.subtitle: Since its founding in 1876, Tung On Wui Kun has witnessed the struggles of generations of Chinese immigrants, carrying deep historical memories.
history.milestone1876Desc: Tung On Wui Kun was officially established in Singapore, providing a mutual aid platform for immigrants from Dongguan and Bao'an. Early members were mostly domestic workers, construction workers, and rubber industry laborers.
history.milestone1923Desc: Founded Tung On Free School, providing free Chinese education for members' children and preserving mother tongue culture, until it closed in 1964 due to the government's English education policy.
history.milestone1943Desc: Tung On Wui Kun established the Cantonese Opera Group, using traditional opera to unite clansmen abroad. In 1947, the 'Tung On Li Yi She' was formally established and continued to participate in charity performances.
history.milestone1946Desc: To care for elderly clansmen's funeral affairs, the Mutual Aid Department was established, providing funeral assistance services for members and embodying the spirit of mutual help.
history.milestone1972Desc: Established a scholarship program to regularly support outstanding members' children in their education, continuing to this day and encouraging the next generation.
history.milestone1992Desc: Together with Tung On associations worldwide, the 1st World Tung On Convention was held in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, establishing the tradition of regular global gatherings.
history.milestone2003Desc: Founded the Singapore Dongguan Chamber of Commerce, building a trade bridge between Singapore and Dongguan, promoting bilateral trade and business cooperation.
history.milestone2019Desc: Tung On Wui Kun hosted the 11th World Tung On Convention with the theme 'Connecting Hearts Across Five Lakes, Gathering Harmony Across Four Seas', attracting clansmen from around the world to Singapore.
history.compMilestone1Desc: Tung On Wui Kun was officially established in Singapore, providing a mutual aid platform for immigrants from Dongguan and Bao'an.
history.compMilestone2Desc: Founded Tung On Free School, providing free Chinese education for members' children.
history.compMilestone3Desc: Established the Cantonese Opera Group. In 1947, 'Tung On Li Yi She' was formally established, preserving Lingnan culture.
history.compMilestone4Desc: Together with associations worldwide, held the 1st World Tung On Convention in Kuala Lumpur.
history.compMilestone5Desc: Founded the Singapore Dongguan Chamber of Commerce, building a trade bridge between Singapore and Dongguan.

conference.title: World Tung On Convention
conference.description: The World Tung On Convention is an international gathering organized by Tung On Wui Kun, held biennially, connecting Dongguan and Bao'an clansmen worldwide to share kinship and explore mutual development.
conference.feature2Desc: Over a thousand attendees at each convention
conference.aboutP1: The World Tung On Convention is an international gathering organized by Tung On Wui Kun, held regularly to connect clansmen worldwide, sharing kinship and exploring mutual development.
conference.aboutP2: Since the 1st convention in 1992, it has been held 11 times. Each convention attracts Tung On clansmen from around the world for cultural exchange, business discussions, and social activities.
conference.aboutP3: Convention events include: opening ceremony, cultural performances, business forums, youth exchange, senior appreciation dinner, and more — one of Tung On Wui Kun's most important annual events.

activities.title: Activities
activities.subtitle: Tung On Wui Kun regularly organizes cultural events, community services, and social gatherings for members.
activities.act1Desc: Preserving Lingnan opera culture through regular rehearsals and performances.
activities.act2Desc: Promoting business cooperation through trade missions and networking events.
activities.act3Desc: Nurturing the next generation through youth fellowships and learning activities.
activities.act4Desc: Celebrating anniversaries and traditional festivals, strengthening kinship.
activities.pageAct1Desc: Preserving Lingnan opera culture. Tung On Li Yi She was established in 1947, with regular public performances promoting traditional arts.
activities.pageAct2Desc: Promoting business cooperation among clansmen, bridging trade between Singapore and Dongguan.
activities.pageAct3Desc: Nurturing the next generation, organizing heritage trips and exchanges, preserving the Tung On spirit.
activities.pageAct4Desc: Celebrating Chinese New Year, Mid-Autumn Festival and other traditional holidays with association anniversary celebrations.
activities.joinDesc: Tung On Wui Kun regularly organizes cultural, social, and business events. All clansmen are welcome to participate. Through these activities, we preserve Chinese culture, strengthen kinship, and expand connections.
